reviews.comment:
Parada fundamental a la vuelta a casa! Ricos tostados. Mucho verde para que los chicos jueguen y corran!

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way home! Delicious toasted sandwiches. Plenty of greenery for the kids to play and run around in!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aEw2Q1J3EAE

reviews.comment:
Servicio Express y gran valoraciones para cada cliente gran atencion

(Translated by Google)
Express service and great ratings for every customer, excellent customer service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5LU9lbWd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El café horrible !! Quemado , ácido. Pare solo para comprar eso y lo tuve que tirar. La tención es amable .

(Translated by Google)
The coffee is horrible! Burnt and acidic. I stopped just to buy that and had to throw it away. The service is friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5eU1EZGhnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Crowded, expensive, and slow service

reviews.comment:
Personal de playa y del bar muy atentos

(Translated by Google)
Very attentive beach and bar staff
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5b0tMcDZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un buen lugar para parar si tienes una emergencia, de lo contrario no. El lugar es viejo y la comida no es la gran cosa, las medialunas más secas que podes probar van a estar acá. El encargado de atender al público no tenia el barbijo bien puesto...

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to stop if you have an emergency, otherwise, no. The place is old and the food isn't great; the driest croissants you'll ever taste are here. The person serving the customers wasn't wearing a mask properly...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcjdiU1JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cuenta con espacio de juegos y mesas afuera y adentro. Muy limpio.

(Translated by Google)
It has a play area and tables both indoors and outdoors. Very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTXzR2VW5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños los vi muy limpios, la nafta es un poco más cara que en CABA,  el autoservicio completo.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms looked very clean, the gas is a bit more expensive than in Buenos Aires, and it's a full self-service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTbDlIOFRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Vuelvo a caer en la trampa y sigo oarando alli... el lugar se desborda de gente y no tiene capacidad, la gente espera de pie que le sirvan comida cara y de mala calidad. No se puede pagar la nafta con la aplicación YPF

(Translated by Google)
I fell into the trap again and kept stopping there... the place was overcrowded and couldn't handle the crowds; people were standing around waiting for expensive, poor-quality food. You can't pay for gas with the YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcDdYRGNBEAE
